detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MarioInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (MarioInu.sol#381-393):
	External calls:
	- _preventSlippage(from,to) (MarioInu.sol#389)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (MarioInu.sol#411)
	External calls sending eth:
	- _preventSlippage(from,to) (MarioInu.sol#389)
		- _taxWallet.transfer(amount) (MarioInu.sol#419)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (MarioInu.sol#391)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (MarioInu.sol#485)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (MarioInu.sol#465)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (MarioInu.sol#467)
	MarioInu._rOwned (MarioInu.sol#195) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MarioInu._takeTeam(uint256) (MarioInu.sol#479-487)
	- MarioInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (MarioInu.sol#461-475)
	- MarioInu.balanceOf(address) (MarioInu.sol#295-299)
	- MarioInu.constructor() (MarioInu.sol#249-259)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (MarioInu.sol#391)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (MarioInu.sol#493)
	MarioInu._rTotal (MarioInu.sol#207) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MarioInu._getCurrentSupply() (MarioInu.sol#621-631)
	- MarioInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (MarioInu.sol#491-497)
	- MarioInu.constructor() (MarioInu.sol#249-259)
	- MarioInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (MarioInu.sol#345-353)
